codeReview.summary: Re-reviewed the feature after the prior failed scrutiny and inspected the latest handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff through acb8f21. The original blocking hole is fixed: `check_return` now rejects `TVoid` expressions in `return ...` position before codegen (`lib/typecheck.ml:1352`), so `return w.write(...)` and `return w.write_header(...)` no longer lower to invalid Go. Regression coverage now includes return-position negatives in both `test/test_typecheck.ml:1658` and `test/test_codegen.ml:2292`, while the representative generated fixture `.factory/runtime/net-http-members.go` still shows the approved receiver/member surface composing and lowering to `HandleFunc`, `FormValue`, `Method`, `WriteHeader`, and `Write`. I did not find remaining blocking gaps in the reviewed feature state for the contracted invalid-value-position behavior.

summary: Result: pass. The latest fix in acb8f21 addresses the prior blocking failure by rejecting `return w.write(...)`/other void expressions during semantic analysis, and the reviewed tests and representative fixture support the contracted receiver/member interop surface without remaining blocking issues.
